I don’t know one thing about Morbius. I never heard of him until the trailer came out. My only hope was that it would not be an overly serious bore/snore-fest like The Batman was. Yes, in my opinion The Batman was boring and lacked the amount of action I like in a super hero movie. If you feel differently, that’s totally OK!

Morbius…
This movie doesn’t take long to get going!  There was no long boring setup and the movie didn’t rely on silly forced comedy. It had great action, good death scenes (without being too graphic), and great special effects! And I’m super extra happy to report that there were no silly car chase and there were no sex scenes! I’m trying to remember if there was even any cussing! It had everything I want in a super hero movie! I really hope this movie does well enough to get a second movie. I LOVED IT! More Morbius!

I’ve seen movies that people love like crazy and I personally didn’t enjoy and vice versa, so who knows what’s next. People praise Star Wars, and I’ve seen them only once. There are people who will love this movie, people will hate this movie, people will hate that it’s not a true MCU movie. Let’s be honest though, unless Doctor Strange in The Multitude of Madness is very dark, the MCU will never touch the darker (too scary for kids) comics. Do I hope Doctor Strange 2 changes how risky Marvel is willing to go for darker storylines? 1000%. Remember that it was Tom Holland who saved Spider-Man from being ripped apart from the MCU and he said he would like to fight Kraven The Hunter, Venom and Morbius in future installments, so we’ll see what happens. Maybe Kevin Feige can land a deal with Sony?
The already have a deal. But idts Marvel will make any dark r- rated movies any time soon.

Dear Sony,

The only way to redeem your Marvel movies at this point is to be different then DC, and MCU. Have full R-Rated Comedy.
Personally the only thing that made Venom good was the silly relationship between Venom and Eddie. So just go full comedy. Hire an actual good director, let them do whatever they creatively please, and don't hold back. Don't take the movies too seriously. Own up to the mistakes, let people know you messed up. . 
From the writing team of Matt Sazama and Burk Sharpless.  Their only writing credits have been together for Lost in Space (TV Series), Power Rangers(2017), Gods of Egypt(2016), The Last Witch Hunter(2015) and Dracula Untold(2014) - not counting Morbius(2022) this writing team scores an average 36\100 MetaScore based upon 107 industry reviewers. To say that Sazama\Sharpless appear to be career killers is an understatement, yet the films they write for draw elite actors\actresses.  

This is an Avi Arad production so the expectations I had were huge going into this, and Matt Tolmach along with Lucas Foster were also onboard to make the stakes of success even higher.....but I believe I found our culprit. 

Emma Ludbrook, who used to be Mr. Leto's assistant, all of a sudden became qualified as a producer, based upon the fact she is labeled 'Producer' for all of 30 Seconds to Mars music videos - Jared Leto's musical group.  What I see here is Jared Leto used his influence to get  Emma Ludbrook her EP spot, and of course you know who Jared Leto only listened to during filming.  The other fish out of water 'Producer' was Louise Rosner, who has a hefty production career and it's neat to watch her excel throughout the decades(since 1988), but she hasn't really done anything since 2017 and I suspect there's a Jared Leto connection there as well. 

Moral of the story....
NEVER allow an actor\actress\musician\whatever..... 
to sway direction of an original production.

just done watching morbius (SPOILER) really good movie tbh, but once again sony disappoint  us a bit, no detail explanation about the villain, or morbius power. The final battle is too short, didnt even last 5 minute last time i remember. Very thin character development and story. And idk how the fk morbius know venom line. Theres no spiderman in this movie, no andrew, no tom no tobey. Literally none because this is morbius solo movie once again. Morbius Gf also have very thin story telling. And idfk what the hell is agent shroud and rodriguez doing this whole movie, totally useless, they just make michael go to jail and they’re gone. Morbius have superhuman strength (like captain america) he can fly, he have really sharp hearings. And he can turn into a bat, he also could swing like a monkey and  hanging  on the pipe. The villain? he is morbius best friend who turn out want to kill morbius and took the bat vampire serum (not really a best friend eh). At the start of the movie? really weird color tone, yeah pink and purple morbius logo (i thought im in wrong movie). Good thing about this movie? Cgi and VFX was absolutely amazing. Story? Mediocre. Character development? Shite. Villain? sony doesnt even show us how he use the serum or how he control the power that easy. first post credit? vulture end up in a empty jail cell and he got released immediately. Second post credit scene? Weird, how the fk morbius just accept an offer from random dude who got wing that showed up from nowhere when he riding a fokin car. overall 7/10 (for me bcs i enjoy it until the final battle who turn out rlly shite)
